hybrid_pricing.tooltip: Time credits earned through community timebanking
hybrid_pricing.explanation: Hybrid pricing lets you pay with a combination of regular currency and time credits you have earned through community service.
hybrid_pricing.label: Pay with cash + time credits

community_delivery.title: Community Delivery
community_delivery.description: A community member can deliver this item and earn time credits.
community_delivery.tooltip: Community delivery is a NEXUS feature where community members offer to deliver items for time credits instead of cash. This supports the local community and the timebanking ecosystem.
community_delivery.step2: Deliverer earns time credits on completion
community_delivery.step3: Buyer confirms delivery, credits are transferred
community_delivery.offer_modal_description: Offer to deliver this item and earn time credits. The buyer/seller will review your offer.
community_delivery.time_credits_hint: How many time credits you want to earn for this delivery
community_delivery.notes_placeholder: Any details about your delivery availability...

onboarding.title: Seller Payment Setup
onboarding.subtitle: Set up Stripe Connect to receive payments from marketplace sales.
onboarding.what_is_stripe_description: Stripe Connect is a secure payment platform that allows you to receive payments directly to your bank account when buyers purchase your marketplace listings. Your financial information is handled entirely by Stripe and is never stored on our servers.
onboarding.need_bank_desc: Your bank account or debit card to receive payouts.
onboarding.need_id_desc: A government-issued ID to verify your identity (required by financial regulations).
onboarding.security_note: You will be redirected to Stripe's secure website to complete the setup. Your financial information is never stored on our servers.
onboarding.complete_description: Your Stripe account is connected and you can now receive payments from marketplace sales.
onboarding.complete_toast: Stripe onboarding complete! You can now receive payments.
onboarding.incomplete_description: Your Stripe account setup is not yet complete. Please finish the onboarding process to start receiving payments.
